features.title: Multi-codebase discovery
features.description: Orchestrator scans for and tracks multiple codebases as first-class entities, each with its own state. Enables the agent-discovery scenario family.
features.notes: Verified by gastown agent-discovery scenario via verify.codebases_count and verify.codebases_names.

features.title: Per-codebase role assignment
features.description: Orchestrator assigns roles to workers within a codebase (e.g. mayor, deacon) and exposes which workers hold which session IDs.
features.notes: Verified by gastown role-assignment scenario via verify.workers_with_session_min and verify.expected_session_ids.

features.title: Global state aggregation
features.description: Orchestrator computes and exposes a global running view across all tracked codebases (top-level running flag, codebase status map, etc.).
features.notes: Verified by gastown state-aggregation scenario via verify.running and verify.codebase_statuses.

features.title: Multi-tick polling lifecycle
features.description: Orchestrator supports being polled across multiple ticks and exposes per-tick state snapshots, allowing scenarios that observe transient changes between ticks.

features.title: Transient global agents
features.description: Orchestrator supports global-scope agents that come and go across ticks (e.g. boot, polecat) without being permanently attached to a codebase.
features.notes: Verified by gastown agent-join-leave scenario via verify.polecat_count_per_tick.

features.title: gt-poller fallback path
features.description: Orchestrator has a fallback code path when its primary poller (gt) fails or returns no useful response, ensuring the global state remains coherent.
features.notes: Verified by gastown polling-lifecycle scenario via verify.boot_present_per_tick (boot agent presence is the fallback signal).

features.title: Sidecar response file format
features.description: Orchestrator consumes structured response artifacts written by workers as sidecar files (rather than parsing free-form output), letting the orchestrator and worker evolve their formats independently.
features.notes: All gastown scenarios depend on this — input fixtures under replaydata/orchestrators/gastown/scenarios/<scenario>/input/ are sidecar files.
